# ProcessReporter v1.7.1

## Highlights

- Distributes ProcessReporter exclusively for Apple Silicon Macs, with Intel code removed from the application and bundled runtime dependencies.

## Fixes and reliability

- Builds the Discord SDK integration from its arm64 library instead of producing a universal dylib.
- Removes Intel slices from Sparkle executables after export, re-signs nested code in dependency order, and rejects the release if any non-arm64 Mach-O file remains.
- Runs the production release on GitHub's native macOS 26 arm64 image and verifies the runner architecture before building.

## Update notes

- ProcessReporter now requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS 15 or later. Intel Macs are no longer supported.
